queries.question: Give me the amounts of all payments and remittance transfers from bank account 1234567.
queries.sql:
SELECT Transaction_Type.amount 
FROM Transaction_Type
WHERE (Transaction_Type.transaction_type = "Payment" OR Transaction_Type.transaction_type = "Remittance Transfer") AND Transaction_Type.bank_account = "1234567"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?amount WHERE {
  ?transaction_type a :Transactions .
  ?transaction_type p:amount ?amount .
  ?transaction_type p:transaction_type ?transaction_type_w .
  ?transaction_type p:transaction_type ?transaction_type_w2 .
  ?transaction_type p:bank_account ?bank_account_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?transaction_type_w) = "Payment" || STR(?transaction_type_w2) = "Remittance Transfer")) && (STR(?bank_account_w) = "1234567" || STR(?bank_account_w) = "1234567.0")))
}
